story:
After I died, I learned I could still look in on Harold. I even ran into his family—Harold’s mother is here, wearing the same sour look and asking where he was. Later I went to check on him. He was in his recliner, TV glowing. I whispered his name; he jerked up—then a figure brushed through me, raised a gun, and fired. I snapped back to my side, and a breath later Harold stood next to me, blinking.

“What happened?” he asked.

“You got shot,” I said.

“I think it was Gloria’s husband,” he muttered.

“Aren’t you dead?” he added.

“It’s relative, Harold,” I said.
question: Right after realizing he has been shot and finding himself beside his former wife, what will Harold most likely ask to do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Ask to go find his mother here.
answer_without_knowledge: Ask to go back and watch the scene at his house.
